title: Biome Establishing Scene Pack
description: Build a biome scene pack that establishes a level's visual identity through loading-screen views, traversal frames, and atmosphere states.

en.title: Biome Establishing Scene Pack
en.description: Build a biome scene pack that establishes a level's visual identity through loading-screen views, traversal frames, and atmosphere states.

zh-CN.title: 地形环境建立镜头包
zh-CN.description: 围绕一个 biome 或关卡区域做建立镜头包，包括加载画面、探索视角和昼夜天气变化。
